# ReverseLab — Open-Source Reverse Engineering Lab & MCP Tool Ecosystem

> 197-article knowledge base, 100+ MCP automation tools for reverse engineering.
> Agent-native architecture. Covers CTF, APK, PE, cryptography, game cheating, and more.

## Quick Links
- Landing Page: https://ling71671.github.io/open-reverselab/
- Knowledge Base: https://ling71671.github.io/open-reverselab/kb/
- MCP Tools: https://ling71671.github.io/open-reverselab/mcp-tools/
- FAQ: https://ling71671.github.io/open-reverselab/faq.html
- GitHub: https://github.com/LING71671/open-reverselab
- Full LLM dump: https://ling71671.github.io/open-reverselab/llms-full.txt
